results.alt: A single drop of pond water contains an entire ecosystem, bustling with predators, prey, and producers. To these organisms, a grain of sand is a mountain. By peering through the lens of a microscope, we uncover structures that seem almost alien—from the precise geometry of viruses to the mechanical behavior of cellular proteins. Understanding the true scale of microbiology
